# Lorann — B2B Data & Marketing Lists

> Lorann provides verified B2B contact databases for healthcare professionals, real estate agents, financial advisors, and business decision-makers across the United States.

## What Lorann Does

Lorann sources, verifies, and delivers B2B marketing lists to help companies reach licensed professionals and business contacts through email, direct mail, phone, and digital advertising channels.

## Key Data Categories

### Healthcare
- Physicians & Doctors (NPI-verified, 850,000+ records)
- Registered Nurses, LPNs, CNAs, Nurse Practitioners
- Hospital Administrators, CEOs, CFOs, CMOs, CNOs
- Dentists, Dental Hygienists, Optometrists
- Pharmacists, Physical Therapists, Occupational Therapists
- Psychologists, Psychiatrists, Licensed Counselors
- Veterinarians, Chiropractors, Allied Health Professionals

### Real Estate
- Licensed Realtors and Real Estate Agents
- Real Estate Brokers
- Property Managers

### Financial Services
- Financial Advisors and Planners
- Insurance Agents and Brokers
- Accountants and CPAs
- Mortgage Brokers

### Business
- Small Business Owners
- Corporate Executives and C-Suite
- IT Decision Makers
- HR Professionals

## Data Quality

- Records verified against official registries (NPPES, state license boards, NAR)
- Weekly hygiene cycles against USPS NCOA and opt-out databases
- Email deliverability validated via SMTP verification
- Bounce rates consistently under 2%
- Phone numbers scrubbed against National DNC Registry

## Compliance

All data is supplied for B2B marketing purposes only. Lorann complies with:
- HIPAA (professional contact data only — no PHI)
- CAN-SPAM
- CCPA and state privacy laws
- FCRA exemption for B2B marketing use
- National Do Not Call Registry

## Delivery Formats

- CSV, Excel (.xlsx), pipe-delimited
- CRM-ready imports (Salesforce, HubSpot, Veeva, Zoho)
- Email broadcast-ready list format
- Programmatic digital audience segments

## Contact

- Website: https://www.lorannllc.com
- Contact form: https://www.lorannllc.com/contact-us
- Request sample: https://www.lorannllc.com/contact-us

## API & Agent Access

- API Catalog: https://www.lorannllc.com/.well-known/api-catalog
- MCP Server: https://www.lorannllc.com/.well-known/mcp
- Agent Skills: https://www.lorannllc.com/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json
